# XR-221

XR-221 is the world's first meta-universe spaceport radio station, blending science fiction lore, immersive storytelling, and real-world connections to Area 15 and the Arc Project. The brand carries a futuristic, otherworldly identity rooted in deep narrative worldbuilding — think intergalactic transmissions, cosmic atmospheres, and a universe where radio waves travel beyond physical space. It sits at the intersection of immersive entertainment, speculative fiction, and avant-garde media.

Source: https://xr-221.zappy5.app

---

# The World's FirstMeta-Universe SpaceportRadio Station


### Intergalactic transmissions rooted in immersive storytelling, science-fiction lore, and real-world signal ties to Area 15 and the Arc Project.




Enter the Transmission

Explore the Lore






















SIGNAL UNIVERSE

## XR-221 is more than a station.It's a living transmission atlas.


Three signal pillars define the XR-221 spaceport radio experience — from deep lore broadcasts to immersive audio design and real-world portal connections at Area 15 and the Arc Project.













TRANSMISSION LOG — 01

### Lore-Driven Broadcasts


Episodic transmissions from the spaceport's outer rings. Station logs, cosmic atmosphere, and speculative fiction continuity thread each broadcast into an evolving XR-221 spaceport radio universe — a signal that builds its own mythology with every cycle.

Explore the lore archive  →












AUDIO SIGNAL — 02

### Immersive Audio Programming


Radio, spoken fiction, artist voices, and podcast-like segments woven through ambient signal design. Each broadcast layer is engineered for immersive listening — a sci-fi radio experience that blurs the line between entertainment and transmission.

Enter the signal stream  →












PORTAL COORDINATES — 03

### Real-World Portal Points


Area 15 resonance and Arc Project connections ground the XR-221 concept in physical culture. This is an immersive entertainment experience rooted in real geography — where the signal crosses from meta-universe into a place you can actually stand.

Find the portal  →

























Origin Signal

## The First Meta World WideXR-221 Spaceport Radio Station


XR-221 is not a radio station. It is a portal — a signal broadcast from a meta-universe spaceport where frequency becomes narrative and every transmission carries you deeper into a living, expanding story universe. Born at the intersection of speculative fiction and immersive culture, XR-221 transforms the act of listening into an act of exploration.


Curated with editorial precision, each broadcast weaves original lore, ambient soundscapes, and cultural intelligence into a seamless experience. This is premium immersive sci-fi radio — not entertainment as noise, but entertainment as cartography.






### The Spaceport Setting


XR-221 transmits from a fictional spaceport at the edge of known space — a liminal zone where civilizations converge, cargo manifests carry encrypted lore, and every docking bay hums with story. The setting is a living world, not a backdrop.







### The Transmission Format


Each broadcast is a curated signal: part editorial radio, part immersive gaming radio broadcast, part ambient atlas. Programming rotates through narrative arcs, live event coverage, and deep-frequency sessions that blur the line between fiction and presence.







### The Area 15 / Arc Project Connection


XR-221 is anchored in real-world immersive culture through its lore ties to Area 15 and the Arc Project — physical portals into the same universe the station inhabits. The signal extends beyond the screen and into experiential space.



































SIGNAL RECEIVED

## Transmissions from the Field


XR-221 spaceport radio has found its audience — immersive gamers, sci-fi storytellers, and creative producers tuned in from across the meta-universe.








“


I've been through every immersive gaming radio broadcast out there — nothing comes close to what XR-221 transmits. The lore depth is staggering. Every session feels like you're receiving an actual signal from a civilization you didn't know existed. The Area 15 and Arc Project ties make it feel terrifyingly real. I tuned in once and rearranged my entire schedule around it.




Maren Okafor
Immersive Gamer & World-Builder



Verified Listener — Spaceport Tier












“


As a sci-fi podcaster, I'm always hunting for source material that has genuine mythological weight. XR-221's lore architecture is unlike any ordinary radio station — it has the texture of a living universe. I've referenced it on three episodes and my audience keeps asking for more.




Theo Vance
Sci-Fi Podcaster, The Outer Frequency



Editorial Collaborator








“


I produce immersive audio experiences for a living. XR-221 has real cultural relevance — the Area 15 connection alone gives it credibility most experimental stations spend decades trying to earn. The atmosphere is unforgettable. I pitched it to three clients as a sonic reference before the month was out.




Sable Reyes
Creative Producer, Immersive Audio Lab



Industry Professional






















Mission Data

## The Transmission Atlas


XR-221 spaceport radio is built on depth — not noise. Every metric below reflects the creative infrastructure behind a universe-scale immersive sci-fi radio experience.







100 +

### Transmission Concepts


Original broadcast ideas spanning the XR-221 meta-universe lore archive.




7

### Audio Format Types


From deep-field narrative episodes to live-format programming and signal intercepts.




3

### Real-World Lore Anchors


Tied to Area 15, the Arc Project, and the physical spaceport universe grid.




∞

### Audience Immersion Depth


A premium visual identity and speculative fiction design built to pull listeners beyond the signal.

Visual Transmissions



## The Universe, Art-Directed



XR-221 spaceport radio is not merely heard — it is inhabited. Every frequency carries a visual signature: sculptural chambers, orbital surfaces, and archival signal logs that prove this is both a listening experience and a fully art-directed universe.

### Transmission Chamber

XR-221 Signal Origin Point

### Signal Archive

### Area Portal Texture

Gateway — Area 15 Arc Project










05


### Cosmic Surface

Terrain Data — Sector 221










06


### Station Briefing

Command — XR-221 Operations




































OPEN CHANNEL

## Enter the Signal.Transmit Your Vision.


XR-221 is more than a broadcast — it's a living universe. Whether you're a creator, collaborator, or curator of immersive sci-fi experiences, we want to hear from you. Inquire about programming, partnerships, and worldbuilding-driven media at the intersection of Area 15 lore and the Arc Project.


### Collaborations, immersive event opportunities, and programming inquiries welcome.

## Privacy Policy

URL: https://xr-221.zappy5.app/privacy
Description: Our privacy policy - how we collect, use, and protect your information

Privacy Policy



















Visual Transmissions



## The Universe, Art-Directed



XR-221 spaceport radio is not merely heard — it is inhabited. Every frequency carries a visual signature: sculptural chambers, orbital surfaces, and archival signal logs that prove this is both a listening experience and a fully art-directed universe.







# Privacy Policy



Last Updated:  6/1/2026



XR-221 ("Company", "we", "our") is committed to protecting your privacy. This privacy policy explains how we collect, use and protect your information when you use our website [business_website] ("Service").


## 1. Information Collection


We may collect the following types of information:


- Personal Information: Name, email address, phone number and address

- Technical Information: IP address, browser type, operating system and website usage data

- Cookies: Information stored on your computer to improve user experience




## 2. Use of Information


We use the collected information for the following purposes:


- Providing requested services

- Improving service and user experience

- Contacting you regarding our services

- Compliance with legal requirements




## 3. Information Sharing


We do not sell, rent or share your personal information with third parties, except in the following cases:


- With your explicit consent

- When required by law

- To protect our rights or user safety

- With service providers who assist in operating the service (under confidentiality agreements)




## 4. User Rights


In accordance with Israeli Privacy Protection Law 1981, you have the following rights:


- Right to access personal information stored about you

- Right to correct inaccurate or incomplete information

- Right to delete personal information in certain circumstances

- Right to object to information processing for marketing purposes

- Right to file a complaint with the Data Protection Authority




## 5. Cookies


Our website uses cookies to improve user experience. You can manage cookies through your browser settings. Disabling cookies may affect website functionality.


## 6. Information Security


We implement reasonable security measures to protect your information, including encryption, firewalls and restricted access control. However, no transmission or storage method is 100% secure.


## 7. Policy Changes


We may update this privacy policy from time to time. Material changes will be posted on the website with 30 days advance notice.



## 8. Contact Information


For questions or requests regarding this privacy policy, please contact us:


- Company: XR-221

- Email: [business_email]

- Phone: [business_phone]

- Address: [business_address]



Data Protection Authority: For complaints, you may contact the Data Protection Authority at the Ministry of Justice









A curated transmission atlas for immersive worlds, cinematic audio, and signal-rich storytelling. Tune in. Drop in. Stay a while.

## Accessibility Statement

URL: https://xr-221.zappy5.app/accessibility
Description: Our accessibility statement - our commitment to digital accessibility

Accessibility Statement



















Visual Transmissions



## The Universe, Art-Directed

# Accessibility Statement



Last updated:  June 1, 2026



XR-221 is committed to making our services accessible to all users. We strive to implement the Israeli Standard (TI 5568) based on WCAG 2.1 Level AA guidelines.


Accessibility Level: AA (Israeli Standard TI 5568)



## 1. Accessibility Policy


We believe in equal rights and the right of every person to receive information and services independently and equally. This website was designed and built with special emphasis on accessibility for people with disabilities.


## 2. Accessibility Arrangements on the Site


- Keyboard navigation support

- Screen reader compatibility

- Appropriate color contrast

- Flexible and scalable font sizes

- Descriptive image alt text

- Hierarchical heading structure

- Clear and descriptive links

- Support for 200% zoom without content loss





### WCAG 2.1 Compliance


The website complies with WCAG 2.1 Level AA, which includes:


- Perceivable: Information is presented in ways users can perceive

- Operable: Interface components are operable

- Understandable: Information and user interface are understandable

- Robust: Content can be interpreted by a variety of technologies





## 3. Supported Assistive Technologies


- NVDA (Windows)

- JAWS (Windows)

- VoiceOver (Mac/iOS)

- TalkBack (Android)

- Dragon NaturallySpeaking

- Switch navigation




## 4. Accessibility Testing


The website has been tested using:


- Automated accessibility testing tools

- Manual testing with screen readers

- Keyboard-only navigation

- Color contrast verification

- Testing with users with disabilities




## 5. Continuous Improvements


We are continuously working to improve the accessibility of our website and update it according to technological developments and user feedback.



## 6. Contact and Feedback


If you encounter an accessibility issue on the site or need assistance, please contact us:


- Company: XR-221

- Email: [business_email]

- Phone: [business_phone]



Response time: We respond to accessibility inquiries within 3 business days and work to resolve issues within 10 business days.









A curated transmission atlas for immersive worlds, cinematic audio, and signal-rich storytelling. Tune in. Drop in. Stay a while.

# Terms of Use



Last updated:  June 1, 2026



Use of this site constitutes agreement to the terms outlined below. Please read carefully before use.



## 1. Definitions


- "Company" - XR-221

- "User" - Anyone who browses or uses the site

- "Services" - Entertainment / Immersive Experience / Radio provided through the site




## 2. Description of Services


XR-221 provides Entertainment / Immersive Experience / Radio through the site. The services are subject to the terms detailed in this document and may change from time to time.


## 3. Terms of Use


Use of the site is conditional on compliance with the following terms:


- Use of the site for lawful purposes only

- No interference with site operations or other users

- No uploading of offensive, illegal, or harmful content

- Respect for copyright and intellectual property rights

- No actions that may compromise site security




## 4. User Obligations


- Providing accurate and truthful information during registration or ordering

- Maintaining confidentiality of account access details

- Immediate notification of any unauthorized account use

- Updating personal information as needed




## 5. Payment and Refund Policy


If services include payment:


- Payments are processed through secure and encrypted systems

- Prices include applicable taxes as required by law

- Right to cancel will be in accordance with consumer protection laws

- Refunds will be processed within 14 business days of cancellation approval




## 6. Limitation of Liability


Services are provided "as is" without warranty of any kind. The Company will not be liable for indirect, consequential, or special damages arising from use of the site, except where required by law.


## 7. Copyright and Intellectual Property


All content on the site, including text, images, design, and code, is protected by copyright owned by XR-221. Reproduction, distribution, or commercial use of content is prohibited without written permission.


## 8. Privacy


Collection and use of personal information is subject to our Privacy Policy. Use of the site constitutes agreement to the Privacy Policy as detailed separately.


## 9. Changes to Terms of Use


The Company may change these terms of use at any time. Material changes will be posted on the site with 30 days advance notice. Continued use after changes constitutes agreement to the new terms.


## 10. Service Termination


The Company may suspend or limit service at any time, including in cases of terms of use violations. In case of service termination, relevant provisions will remain in effect.


## 11. Governing Law and Dispute Resolution


These terms of use are governed by applicable laws. Any disputes will be resolved in accordance with local jurisdiction, with preference given to arbitration or mediation where possible.


## 12. General Provisions


- If any portion of the terms is found invalid, remaining terms will remain in effect

- Non-enforcement of a right will not be considered a waiver

- These terms of use constitute the entire agreement between the parties





## 13. Contact Information


For questions or clarifications regarding the terms of use:


- Company: XR-221

- Email: [business_email]

- Phone: [business_phone]

- Address: [business_address]
